sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16827" key="a)su/nneustos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀσύν-νευστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n16827.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">non-convergent</tr_>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ. σύννευσις,</foreign> of curve and asymptote, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg011:p.177F" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Euc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.177F.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
